verse.ref: Matthew 5:16 — Day 21 of 31, from 21 Bible/📖 Daily Verse Rotation

health.summary: HbA1c 7.61% + fasting glucose 6.59 (diabetic-range) + high cholesterol — book doctor's visit
health.action: Book doctor's visit re: glucose + cholesterol — see 📊 Health Trend note

forecast.title: Solution Forecast — plan for the October retest
forecast.why_wait: HbA1c reflects your ~3-month average blood glucose — nothing meaningful shows on a retest before then, no matter how well the plan goes.
plan: Lift 3–4×/week, not daily — full body or upper/lower split, with rest days so cortisol comes down (unrecovered training raises fasting glucose).

Walk daily, at least 45 min — moderate cardio on non-lifting days improves insulin sensitivity independent of weight loss (ADA/AHA guidance), effects typically visible in 8–12 weeks. 3:35 PM iMessage nudge already scheduled.
Keto: unsaturated fats first — olive oil, avocado, fish, nuts — over saturated (butter, bacon, coconut oil). Your LDL is already 'very high'; the wrong keto can raise it further.
If keeping the weekly OMAD day, make it a rest day (not a lifting day), and eat protein + fiber first in that meal.
Sleep 7–8 hrs — already right, keep it.
Start logging activity + food now — the smart-scale weight trend alone won't explain the October numbers.
Book the doctor visit before October: ask about an OGTT (HbA1c vs. fasting-glucose mismatch), eGFR 83 before ruling metformin in/out, and LFT-monitoring vs. keto-only for the statin question.
forecast.note: General health information, not a diagnosis or prescription — the doctor visit is the authoritative source.
